goal: Chinese README — translate the trial-blocking opening sections

summary.title: Chinese README for trial-user audience
summary.what: Add README.zh.md mirroring the load-bearing opening of README.md (positioning / Who runs what / Cursor walkthrough / pain table / 5-min quickstart). Architecture and reference depth stay English; the zh file points there.
summary.why: Trial-user audience reads Chinese. English-only README is a friction at the deciding moment.

decisions.chose: load-bearing opening only, depth stays English
decisions.rationale: maintaining two long docs in lockstep is its own bug; one zh opener that decides whether Mainline is for them, plus an English depth-doc, is the cheapest split that works

anti_patterns.what: Translating the entire README and maintaining both in sync
anti_patterns.why: Two long docs drift; the opening drives adoption, the depth supports it — only translate the opening
